CREATE TABLE users (id UInt32, username String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO users VALUES (1, 'alice'), (2, 'bob'), (3, 'charlie');
SELECT currentUser();
SELECT user();
SELECT current_user();
SELECT USER();
SELECT username FROM users WHERE username = currentUser();
SELECT currentUser(), COUNT(*) FROM users GROUP BY currentUser();
SELECT (SELECT currentUser()) AS user_name, COUNT(*) FROM users GROUP BY user_name;
SELECT * FROM (SELECT currentUser() AS user_name, COUNT(*) AS user_count FROM users GROUP BY user_name);
WITH (SELECT currentUser() AS user_name) AS subquery SELECT user_name FROM subquery;
CREATE TABLE logs (log_id UInt32, user String, action String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY log_id;
INSERT INTO logs VALUES (1, 'alice', 'login'), (2, 'bob', 'logout'), (3, 'alice', 'update');
SELECT user, COUNT(*) FROM logs WHERE user = currentUser() GROUP BY user;
SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM logs WHERE user = currentUser()) AS actions_count;
SELECT (SELECT currentUser() FROM logs) FROM users HAVING username IN ('alice', 'bob');
SELECT currentUser() AS current_user, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM logs WHERE user = current_user) AS log_count;
SELECT DISTINCT currentUser() FROM users JOIN logs ON users.username = logs.user;
SELECT currentUser(), SUM(log_id) FROM logs GROUP BY currentUser();
SELECT currentUser() FROM (SELECT currentUser() AS user_name UNION ALL SELECT username FROM users) AS combined;
CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, user_name String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (1, 'alice'), (2, 'bob');
SELECT user_name, (SELECT currentUser()) AS executed_by FROM test_table;
